fittings.name: Ablative Meteor Shielding
fittings.description: Stealthy orbital insertion; invisible to TL3 sensors; -3 to TL4 sensor checks. Inoperable until next maintenance after use.

fittings.name: Aquatic Adaptation Suite
fittings.description: 3D movement underwater at normal Move; indefinite breathing; pressure immunity to ~1000m; vision 90m in dark; mounted weapons work underwater.

fittings.name: Assault Charge Servos
fittings.description: Once per scene as a Move action, move triple Move; ignore Fighting Withdrawal vs melee while using it.

fittings.name: Backseat Driver Mod
fittings.description: Autonav returns suit to a nominated location if user is incapacitated; SOS/location options; empty suit can return on command word. 15+ damage incapacitates until maintenance.

fittings.name: Black Ofuda
fittings.description: Jailbreak for Tsukumogami Processor (1 day, Int/Program vs 10). VI may fire weapons, take bonus physical actions, or move; wearer cannot override. Empty VI suit: 15 HP + Soak, +6 AB, save 14+, Move 10m.

fittings.name: Brainguard Cap
fittings.description: Alerts wearer to telepathic targeting. Mental saves vs psychic powers rolled twice, take better. Does not function for psychic wearers.

fittings.name: Breacher Fist
fittings.description: Main Action: blast human-sized hole in adjacent wall up to 1m thick (not TL4 fortification). Vs immobile targets: demo charge damage.

fittings.name: Camo Skin, Advanced
fittings.description: As Basic Camo Skin, but +2 Stealth at any range.

fittings.name: Camo Skin, Basic
fittings.description: On Turn: change coloration. +2 Stealth if no observer closer than 20m.

fittings.name: Choke Cloud Sprayer
fittings.description: Move action: trigger Readied gas grenade; affects burst including user without sealed systems.

fittings.name: Comm Suite, Advanced
fittings.description: 50 km range; encrypted vs TL4; TL3 cannot detect.

fittings.name: Comm Suite, Basic
fittings.description: Short-range radio ~2 km; video on command.

fittings.name: Deployable Force Shield
fittings.description: Main Action: 3×3m force shield, hard cover, 20 HP (heavy weapons). Scene / deactivate / reuse. Second+ use in scene: 1d6, 5+ drains for scene.

fittings.name: Drone Mount
fittings.description: Mount one man-portable drone (10 min). Bonus Main Action per mount for commanding that drone only.

fittings.name: ECM Projector
fittings.description: On Turn: jam non-allied TL3- radio/remote in 300m for up to 30 min; equal recalibrate time.

fittings.name: Efficiency Core, Advanced
fittings.description: 8 hours on one Type B cell (cell ruined).

fittings.name: Efficiency Core, Basic
fittings.description: 2 hours on one Type B cell (cell ruined).

fittings.name: Efficiency Core, Pretech
fittings.description: 24 hours on one Type B cell (cell ruined).

fittings.name: Efficiency Core, Restricted Directorate
fittings.description: Runs indefinitely without a cell; maintenance once per month.

fittings.name: Emergency Power Cell
fittings.description: Backup Type B cell auto-takes over when main depletes; destroyed after usual runtime.

fittings.name: Exoskeletal Boost, Advanced
fittings.description: As Basic, but effective Str mod +3; Stowed Enc. usable as Readied.

fittings.name: Exoskeletal Boost, Basic
fittings.description: Effective Strength 18 for Encumbrance and ability modifiers.

fittings.name: Exoskeletal Boost, Pretech
fittings.description: As Advanced; Str 22 for Encumbrance; lift/bend/break unarmored objects up to compact-car size as Main Action.

fittings.name: Finger of Death
fittings.description: Main Action: invisible lethal radiation beam within 10m. On hit, death in 48h without TL4 care / vacc-suit shielding. Each use: 1d6 on 1 exposes user.

fittings.name: Floodlights
fittings.description: Illuminate 30m around or 50m ahead. Attackers -2 to hit while on unless glare-protected. Token light AE applies while the fitting is enabled and the suit is powered.

fittings.name: Ghost Walker Field
fittings.description: On Turn: invisible/inaudible to unaided and typical TL4 sensors. Melee -4 if location known; ranged futile. Breaks on run/attack/sharp motion/psychic use. Up to 15 min; 15 min recharge.

fittings.name: Gravitic Flight Struts
fittings.description: Fly at normal Move up to 15 min; 15 min recharge after use ends.

fittings.name: Gravitic Fold Flight
fittings.description: Fly indefinitely at twice normal Move.

fittings.name: Hydraulic Jump Dampers
fittings.description: Ignore first 100m of fall damage; always land on feet.

fittings.name: Identification Lock
fittings.description: Whitelist lock. Reset: Int/Fix or Int/Program vs 12, one day. Unauthorized uninstall: Int/Fix vs 12 or slag suit.

fittings.name: Integral Ripper Bar
fittings.description: Cut man-sized hole in non-metallic non-fortified barrier as Main Action. Weapon: Str/Dex, 3d6, Shock 2/18, Trauma d8/x4, -3 to hit.

fittings.name: Integrated Ammo Feed
fittings.description: Load up to 10 Enc. physical ammo; On Turn reload into any Readied weapon.

fittings.name: Jump Jets
fittings.description: Move action: leap 30m H/V; ignore falls ≤30m. Not usable two consecutive rounds.

fittings.name: Kinetic Rebuke Shielding
fittings.description: When attacked within 5m: 3d8 before attack resolves, Evasion for half. Once per round.

fittings.name: Linked Targeting System
fittings.description: Associated with a weapon mount (change at maintenance). Bonus attack with that weapon whenever attacking with another. Each after first: +1 Mass and Power.

fittings.name: Multispectral Optics
fittings.description: Full-color + thermal out to normal sight; ignores smoke/mist/darkness. Token sight AE approximates darkvision while enabled and powered.

fittings.name: Neural Buffer
fittings.description: Psychics only: +2 Effort recovering once per 24 hours.

fittings.name: Night Vision Sensors
fittings.description: Monochrome night vision to 100m. Token sight AE (darkvision, range 100) while enabled and powered.

fittings.name: Onboard Medical Unit
fittings.description: Up to 12 pharma doses; On Turn administer to self or adjacent ally (1/round). Heal-1 if user lower. Counts as medkit.

fittings.name: Pathfinder Bridging System
fittings.description: On Turn deploy 20m × 1m bridge/ladder. Adhesion resists 15 dmg knockaway / 30 to break. 5 min to reclaim or unusable until maintenance.

fittings.name: Plague Wind Generator
fittings.description: Main Action: 5m nerve gas, 6d6 (save half) including user without sealed systems. Once between maintenance.

fittings.name: Plating Optimization
fittings.description: Plating AC −2 and Soak halved (ceil); halves Mass/Power of other fittings. No effect without plating.

fittings.name: Plating, Advanced
fittings.description: AC 20, Soak 25, +2 Trauma Target, Shock immune, immune to TL3 or lower weapons. Only one plating.

fittings.name: Plating, Basic
fittings.description: AC 18, Soak 20, +1 Trauma Target, Shock immune, immune to TL3 or lower weapons. Only one plating.

fittings.name: Plating, Improvised
fittings.description: AC 16, Soak 15, +1 Trauma Target; immune to TL2 or lower weapons. Only one plating.

fittings.name: Plating, Pretech
fittings.description: AC 22, Soak 30, +2 Trauma Target; Trauma only from vehicle-Trauma weapons; Shock immune; immune TL3−. Only one plating.

fittings.name: QECM Projector
fittings.description: As ECM, 500m, affects TL4 comms and non-LOS remote; fizzles nuclear detonations in area.

fittings.name: Reactive Antipersonnel Armor
fittings.description: Main Action: 3d8 in 5m, Evasion half. Reload 5 min + scrap.

fittings.name: Regenerative Force Field
fittings.description: +10 Soak.

fittings.name: Ricochet Field
fittings.description: Main Action: 2×2m frontal field; physical bullets require Dex/Shoot vs 9 or deflect; shrapnel auto. Costs a Move each round; 30 min cooldown after drop.

fittings.name: Sealed Systems, Advanced
fittings.description: Immune toxic gases; nullifies non-instantly-lethal radiation; oxygen/thermal for deep space/underwater while powered.

fittings.name: Sealed Systems, Basic
fittings.description: Filters dangerous gases and mild radiation; no onboard oxygen.

fittings.name: Short-Range Warp Capacitor
fittings.description: On Turn: teleport ≤30m to visible location. After first use in scene: 1d6, 3− fails for rest of scene.

fittings.name: Skysweeper Laser System
fittings.description: Once/round auto-disable first ballistic munition that would hit/include user.

fittings.name: Smokethrower
fittings.description: On Turn: 5m smoke; user sees through it. Shrouded: no ranged targeting, −4 melee. 1d6+1 rounds; once/scene.

fittings.name: Storm Reinforcement
fittings.description: Ignore Suppressive Fire (direct targeting still works).

fittings.name: Stun Skin
fittings.description: 2d6 nonlethal to grapplers / successful unarmed attackers each hit/round.

fittings.name: Target Lock Processor
fittings.description: Move: lock visible target for +4 to hit; On Turn end; one lock at a time.

fittings.name: Thermal Ablative Layer
fittings.description: Halve incoming fire damage before defenses; negate smoke inhalation and fire ≤10 HP. Not plasma/laser.

fittings.name: Trauma Stabilizer Unit
fittings.description: Auto-stabilize at 0 HP unless Traumatic Hit or unsurvivable injury.

fittings.name: Tsukumogami Processor
fittings.description: Companion VI: bonus Main Action for non-physical actions or triggering suit systems (not weapons/movement). +3 to suit/military skill checks.

fittings.name: Wallcrawler Anchors
fittings.description: Climb sheer/overhangs at normal Move; needs one free hand.

fittings.name: Weapon Mount, Advanced
fittings.description: As Basic; man-portable heavy OK; slugthrowers 4 magazines; +3 hit and damage.

fittings.name: Weapon Mount, Basic
fittings.description: Integrate one 1–2H non-heavy weapon (1 day). Energy unlimited ammo; slugthrowers 2 magazines (reload both as one Main). +2 hit and damage (not Shock).

fittings.name: Weapon Mount, Heavy
fittings.description: Vehicle heavy weapon; energy unlimited; slug/missile 3 magazines; +3 to hit.

fittings.name: Weasel Probe
fittings.description: Ferret probe on fiber cable; Move 20m/round to 200m; darkvision; +2 Stealth; AC 15, 4 HP. Destroyed → unusable until maintenance.
